faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Didn't find an answer? Write to us at

items.question: How do I buy a ticket?
items.answer: Find an event on the Events page, click the "Buy ticket" button and follow the checkout steps. You can pay by card or another available method.

items.question: Do I need to register to buy a ticket?
items.answer: Yes, to complete a purchase you need a TicketAll account. Registration is free and takes less than a minute.

items.question: Where can I find my purchased tickets?
items.answer: After signing in, go to My Account → My Tickets. Each ticket contains a QR code that is scanned at the entrance.

items.question: How does ticket scanning at the entrance work?
items.answer: The event organizer or entrance staff scans your ticket's QR code using the TicketAll Scanner app. You can show the ticket directly in your mobile browser — printing is not required.

items.question: Can I return or exchange a ticket?
items.answer: Ticket return conditions are governed by the rules of the specific organizer. Contact us at info@ticketall.eu and we will help you resolve the situation.

items.question: How will my ticket be delivered?
items.answer: After a successful payment, we automatically send you the ticket by email as a PDF with a QR code. You can also find it in the My Tickets section after signing in.

items.question: What if my ticket doesn't work at the entrance?
items.answer: Make sure your screen is bright enough and the QR code is not damaged. If you have problems, contact the entrance staff directly or us at info@ticketall.eu.

items.question: Are my payment details safe?
items.answer: Payments are processed through a certified payment system. TicketAll does not store payment card numbers — all transactions take place over an encrypted connection.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatBody: Cookies are small text files that a website stores in your browser when you visit. They help the site remember your preferences and login state.
cookies.functionalPurpose: Remembering the cart and display preferences
cookies.noTracking: We currently do not use third-party tracking or advertising cookies.
cookies.manageBody: Most modern browsers allow you to manage or delete cookies in their settings. Disabling essential cookies may disrupt the functioning of login and ticket purchases.
cookies.contactBody: Send any questions about cookies to

controller.heading: Controller
controller.intro: The controller of personal data is the company
controller.intro2: , with its registered office in Slovakia (exact address to be added).

collected.heading: What data do we collect?
items: History of orders and purchased tickets

purpose.heading: For what purpose?
items: Fulfilment of legal obligations (accounting, tax documents)

retention.heading: Retention period
retention.body: We retain personal data for the duration of the contractual relationship and further in accordance with statutory periods (5 years for tax documents, 10 years for accounting records). After these periods expire, the data is securely deleted.

rights.heading: Your rights
items: Right of access to personal data
Right to rectification of incorrect data
Right to erasure (the “right to be forgotten”)
rights.requestPrefix: Send requests to exercise your rights to

complaints.heading: Complaints
complaints.body: If you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR Regulation, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic

contact.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us – we reply within 1 business day.
